overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a 1930s American city street with vintage cars, brick buildings, and period-dressed pedestrians. The scene features cobblestone roads, ornate street lamps, and transitions from a quiet residential block to a busier commercial intersection with a tram.

scene_state.functional_zone: 1930s urban sidewalk with vintage parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing a park bench and vintage vehicles

entered.detail: Multi-story red brick building with fire escapes and arched windows
Stone facade building with columns and large windows
1930s era black sedan parked along the curb
Wooden slatted park bench on the concrete sidewalk
Large rooftop billboard advertising Savings & Loan bank
Decorative black metal street lamp with curved design
Red painted fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a 1930s city sidewalk lined with red brick and stone apartment buildings. A vintage black sedan is parked along the curb, and a wooden park bench sits on the concrete pavement. The Savings & Loan billboard is visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

events.description: steps off concrete sidewalk onto cobblestone street surface
turns left to follow the street direction along the cobblestone road

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone street and continuing along the road edge

entered.detail: Factory smokestacks emitting dark smoke visible in the distance
Dark blue USPS-style mailbox on the sidewalk
Row of green leafy trees planted along the sidewalk
Moving traffic of 1930s era vehicles on the cobblestone road

segments.scene_description: Crossing onto the cobblestone street, the view opens to reveal industrial smokestacks in the distance. Vintage cars drive along the road as the camera turns left, passing a blue mailbox and tree-lined sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and pedestrians

events.description: pedestrian density increases with period-dressed NPCs walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past storefronts and navigating around pedestrians dressed in 1930s clothing

notable_agents.action: man in suspenders standing near cardboard boxes on the sidewalk
couple walking together along the storefronts

entered.detail: Storefront with vertical PAWNSHOP sign in red letters
Green vertical sign advertising a deli restaurant
Stack of cardboard boxes sitting on the sidewalk
Square metal grate surrounding a tree base
Metal garbage can on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk becomes busier with pedestrians in period clothing. Storefronts including a pawnshop and deli line the street. The camera passes a blue mailbox and trees planted in metal grates while navigating around pedestrians and cardboard boxes on the pavement.

events.description: vintage tram comes into view on the left side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection where a vintage tram is visible on the left

notable_agents.action: man in suit walking near the tram tracks

entered.detail: Vintage electric tram with dark red coloring stopped at the intersection
Wide cobblestone intersection with pedestrian crossing lines
Metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: Approaching a wider intersection, a vintage tram becomes visible on the left side of the street. The cobblestone road features embedded tram tracks, and the view opens up to show more of the 1930s cityscape with additional vintage vehicles and pedestrians near the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet residential sidewalk into a bustling 1930s commercial intersection. It begins by moving past red brick apartment buildings and a parked black sedan, with a Savings & Loan billboard visible under a clear blue sky. As the camera steps onto the cobblestone street, the view opens to reveal distant industrial smokestacks before turning left past a blue mailbox and tree-lined pavement. The environment then shifts into a denser urban area filled with pedestrians in period clothing and storefronts like a pawnshop and deli, navigating around cardboard boxes on the sidewalk. Finally, the scene expands at a wide intersection where the cobblestone road gives way to embedded tram tracks and a vintage tram appears alongside a surge of period vehicles and crowds.
